glosses.ja: 髪型; ヘアスタイル

sentences.target: Meine Frisur sitzt heute echt gut.

translations.de: Meine Frisur sitzt heute echt gut.
translations.en: My hairstyle looks really good today.
translations.es: Hoy mi pelo se ve muy bien.
translations.it: Oggi i miei capelli stanno benissimo.
translations.ko: 오늘 머리 스타일이 정말 잘 나왔어.
translations.he: היום השיער שלי נראה ממש טוב.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tóc tôi trông rất đẹp.
translations.nl: Mijn haar zit vandaag echt goed.
translations.hu: Ma nagyon jól áll a hajam.
translations.hi: आज मेरे बाल बहुत अच्छे लग रहे हैं।
translations.pl: Dziś moje włosy wyglądają naprawdę dobrze.
translations.el: Σήμερα τα μαλλιά μου δείχνουν πολύ ωραία.
translations.nb: I dag sitter håret mitt skikkelig bra.
translations.id: Hari ini rambutku terlihat sangat bagus.
translations.sv: I dag sitter håret mitt riktigt bra.
translations.ro: Astăzi părul meu arată foarte bine.
translations.cs: Dnes mi vlasy vypadají opravdu dobře.
translations.da: I dag sidder mit hår virkelig godt.
translations.ja: 今日は髪型がすごく決まってる。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (1st person singular) agreeing with a feminine singular noun in nominative; modifies 'Frisur'.
Common noun, feminine, nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Finite verb, 3rd person singular, present indicative; intransitive predicate meaning 'is sitting/holding (well)'.
Temporal adverb indicating the time reference.
Degree adverb functioning as an intensifier modifying the predicate.
Adverb of manner expressing quality/degree of how the action holds.

translations.it: Mi piace molto la tua acconciatura.
translations.ko: 너 머리 스타일 진짜 마음에 들어.
translations.he: אני ממש אוהב את התסרוקת שלך.
translations.vi: Tôi rất thích kiểu tóc của bạn.
translations.nl: Ik vind je kapsel echt mooi.
translations.hi: मुझे तुम्हारी हेयरस्टाइल बहुत पसंद है।
translations.pl: Bardzo podoba mi się twoja fryzura.
translations.el: Μου αρέσει πολύ το χτένισμά σου.
translations.nb: Jeg liker frisyren din veldig godt.
translations.ro: Îmi place foarte mult coafura ta.
translations.cs: Moc se mi líbí tvůj účes.
translations.da: Jeg kan virkelig godt lide din frisure.
translations.ja: 君の髪型がすごく好き。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb, 1st person singular, present indicative; takes a direct object.
Possessive determiner (2nd person singular) agreeing with a feminine singular noun in accusative; modifies 'Frisur'.
Common noun, feminine, accusative singular; direct object of 'mag'.
Degree adverb intensifying the verb phrase (extent of liking).

sentences.target: Die Frisur passt nicht zum Kleid.

translations.de: Die Frisur passt nicht zum Kleid.
translations.en: The hairstyle doesn’t match the dress.
translations.es: Ese peinado no combina con el vestido.
translations.fr: La coiffure ne va pas avec la robe.
translations.it: L’acconciatura non sta bene con il vestito.
translations.ko: 그 헤어스타일은 드레스랑 잘 안 어울려.
translations.zh-Hans: 这个发型和这条裙子不搭。
translations.yue: 呢個髮型同呢條裙唔夾。
translations.ru: Эта прическа не подходит к платью.
translations.pt: Esse penteado não combina com o vestido.
translations.vi: Kiểu tóc này không hợp với chiếc váy.
translations.nl: Dat kapsel past niet bij de jurk.
translations.uk: Ця зачіска не пасує до сукні.
translations.hu: Ez a frizura nem illik a ruhához.
translations.hi: यह हेयरस्टाइल उस ड्रेस के साथ नहीं जंचती।
translations.pl: Ta fryzura nie pasuje do sukienki.
translations.el: Αυτό το χτένισμα δεν ταιριάζει με το φόρεμα.
translations.id: Gaya rambut itu tidak cocok dengan gaun itu.
translations.ro: Coafura asta nu se potrivește cu rochia.
translations.cs: Ten účes se nehodí k šatům.
translations.fi: Tämä kampaus ei sovi mekon kanssa.
translations.ja: その髪型はドレスに合っていない。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine nominative singular; determines 'Frisur'.
Common noun, feminine, nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Finite verb, 3rd person singular, present indicative; intransitive predicate 'to fit/match'.
Negation particle marking clausal negation.
Contraction of preposition 'zu' + definite article 'dem'; governs dative; introduces the prepositional complement.
Common noun, neuter, dative singular (after 'zu[m]'); object of the preposition.

sentences.target: Er braucht bald eine neue Frisur.

translations.de: Er braucht bald eine neue Frisur.
translations.en: He needs a new hairstyle soon.
translations.fr: Il doit bientôt se faire couper les cheveux.
translations.it: Gli serve presto un nuovo taglio di capelli.
translations.pt: Ele precisa cortar o cabelo logo.
translations.vi: Anh ấy cần cắt tóc sớm.
translations.nl: Hij moet snel naar de kapper.
translations.hu: Hamarosan le kell vágatnia a haját.
translations.hi: उसे जल्द ही बाल कटवाने की जरूरत है।
translations.ro: Are nevoie să se tundă curând.
translations.ja: 彼はそろそろ髪を切ったほうがいい。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb, 3rd person singular, present indicative; takes a direct object.
Temporal adverb indicating near future.
Indefinite article, feminine accusative singular; determines 'Frisur'.
Attributive adjective, positive degree, agreeing with feminine accusative singular noun 'Frisur'.
Common noun, feminine, accusative singular; direct object of 'braucht'.
